heading: Arms and ammunition: immunity from taxation
label: 2385 Arms and ammunition: immunity from taxation
text: No tax on the sale or transfer of firearms, pistols, revolvers, shells, or cartridges may be imposed on such articles when bought with funds appropriated for a military department.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)23855:171w., subch. VII, § 706, .Jan. 6, 1951, ch. 121364 Stat. 1236The words “No * * * may be” are substituted for the words “None * * * shall be subject to any”. The words “by any Act” are omitted as surplusage.
